title: Manifest compatibility gate + repair/reinitialize (remote engine)
description: Promoted from MPI-64 Phase 3 Step 5 / OPEN-ITEMS F1. Read GET /wrapper/manifest at readiness and run the repair/reinitialize decision matrix from research/volume-manifest-schema.md: arch-family/CUDA/image-digest mismatch → Reinitialize; ComfyUI/PyTorch/bundle mismatch → Repair; VRAM/DC/model-missing → Warn. Gate generation on an incompatible profile with a clear modal + a repair/reinitialize action, instead of letting it fail mid-generation. The manifest is written Pod-side (Phase 3 Step 3 wrapper) and survives Pod stop/start. App + backend. See brief.md.
